Membership Benefits

What You Get
In Swiss Circle

I
📊
Expert Analysis

Receive in-depth crypto analyses from Swiss Trader — detailed visual and audio explanations of each setup, including entry rationale, risk parameters, and market context.

II
⚡
Live Trade Signals

Real-time trading calls with precise entry, stop loss, and take profit levels. Every signal is backed by a clear setup thesis so you understand the why behind each trade.

III
🌐
Market Intelligence

Stay ahead with real-time market overviews, macro analysis, and on-chain data breakdowns. Know what the market is doing before the crowd catches on.

IV
🏯
Elite Community

Join a curated Discord of serious traders. No noise — only strategy discussions, peer accountability, and a network of like-minded individuals committed to consistent profitability.

V
🎓
Education & Sessions

Regular live sessions, Q&A's with lead traders, and our free SC Trading Book. Whether you're a beginner or experienced trader, there's always something new to sharpen your edge.

VI
🎁
Exclusive Perks

Access to exchange partner deals, giveaways, and special events. Plus, pay your membership in crypto — ETH, SOL, BNB, USDT, or USDC — through our Subscord integration.

About Swiss Circle

A Premium Crypto Trading Community Built on Swiss Precision

Swiss Circle is a private cryptocurrency trading community founded by Swiss Trader (@swisstrader09), a professional crypto trader based in Switzerland. The community brings together five specialist traders covering technical analysis, quantitative strategies, market sentiment, higher-timeframe setups, and long-term investment — giving members access to institutional-quality analysis at a fraction of the cost.

Members receive real-time crypto trading signals for Bitcoin, Ethereum and major altcoins, with full entry, stop-loss and take-profit levels and defined risk parameters. Every signal is built around a clear thesis — so you understand the trade, not just copy it.

What Makes Swiss Circle Different

Unlike most crypto signal groups that rely on a single analyst, Swiss Circle operates with five distinct specialists — each with a different edge. This means coverage across multiple market conditions, timeframes and asset classes without compromising depth or conviction.

The community runs on Discord, with structured channels for live signals, educational content, market commentary, and direct access to the traders. Membership is priced at $79.95/month — significantly below comparable services that charge $180 or more — with no lock-in contracts and full cancel-anytime flexibility. Payments are accepted via card, PayPal and cryptocurrency.

Swiss Circle is rated 4.9 out of 5 by verified members on Whop, with over 60 reviews praising the quality of signals, educational depth, and the responsiveness of the team.

Get Started

How to Join
Swiss Circle

01
Choose Payment

Pay by card via Whop, or in crypto (ETH, SOL, BNB, USDT, USDC) via Subscord. Both give you instant access.

02
Subscribe

Complete your monthly membership. $79.95/month, cancel anytime. No lock-in contracts, no surprises.

03
Access Discord

Get instant access to the Swiss Circle Discord. All channels, signals, analyses, and the community — live immediately.

04
Start Trading

Follow along, learn the system, and start making smarter decisions in the crypto market with elite guidance at your side.
